core_mechanism: Re-expressing a high-order group-invariant recoupling amplitude in an overcomplete basis of coherent (minimum-uncertainty) states, so that in a large-parameter limit a stationary-phase / saddle-point contribution from the semiclassical states dominates the sum
brief_reason: The abstract takes the 15j recoupling symbol into a coherent-state basis whose labels have a direct geometric meaning and shows that the semiclassical (minimum-uncertainty) states dominate the evaluation of the correlations, which is exactly a coherent-state saddle-point/stationary-phase reduction of an invariant amplitude.
